goal: One ultimate-like signature VFX prompt for each tower, optimized for ChatGPT image generation and later background removal in post-processing.
workflow: Generate on pure black background, then cut out and composite in-engine or in post using additive/screen or mixed blending as needed.
render_note: These are effect-only prompts. They intentionally exclude towers, monsters, weapons, scenery, and UI.
retry_note: If the result includes a tower, weapon, scenery, or looks like a cinematic explosion scene, retry with this sentence appended: remove all units and scenery, keep only one isolated ultimate VFX element on a pure black background, make the silhouette cleaner, larger, and easier to read as a gameplay effect asset.
effect_style_guide: cyberpunk tower defense VFX asset, premium mobile game ultimate skill illustration, effect-only image, single large VFX element, centered composition, full effect visible, enough empty margin, pure black background, high contrast glow, readable silhouette, no tower, no monster, no weapon source, no environment, no floor, no smoke clouds, no debris chunks, no text, no logo, no watermark
